landing.heroDescription: The continental digital infrastructure for animal resources data management, serving 55 Member States and 8 Regional Economic Communities under the African Union.
landing.footerDescription: ARIS is the continental digital infrastructure for animal resources management, serving 55 Member States and 8 Regional Economic Communities under the African Union Agenda 2063.
landing.copyright: © {year} African Union – Inter-African Bureau for Animal Resources. All rights reserved.
